items.title: Some quick in-flight analysis:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some quick in-flight analysis:

🏀Thunder are now below the second apron. Plenty of wiggle room without going back over the second apron. OKC will create a $17.7M TPE for Dort.

🏀Hawks are ~$4M under the luxury tax after taking on Lu Dort for Zaccharie Risacher.

1/2

items.title: Forget the cash savings (which will be significant), it was simply time for OKC to move on from Lu Dort. JDub can assume the bigger wing defensive assignments. Cason Wallace still around for point-of-attack defense. Ajay Mitchell is ready. McCain deserves minutes. OKC needs to se
items.author: Jon Hamm
items.body_excerpt: Forget the cash savings (which will be significant), it was simply time for OKC to move on from Lu Dort. JDub can assume the bigger wing defensive assignments. Cason Wallace still around for point-of-attack defense. Ajay Mitchell is ready. McCain deserves minutes. OKC needs to see what Topic is.

items.title: There are zero teams projected to be in the second apron this season.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
There are zero teams projected to be in the second apron this season.

This would be the first time it’s happened since the second apron has been implemented.

items.title: The Hawks now are teaming up a 27-year-old elite defender in Dort with Dyson Daniels and Nickeil Alexander-Walker on the wings -- and will have $40+ million in cap space next summer. Atlanta pursued several wings this offseason before landing Dort.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Hawks now are teaming up a 27-year-old elite defender in Dort with Dyson Daniels and Nickeil Alexander-Walker on the wings -- and will have $40+ million in cap space next summer. Atlanta pursued several wings this offseason before landing Dort.

items.title: BREAKING: The Oklahoma City Thunder trading All-Defensive wing Lu Dort to the Atlanta Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to OKC, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Dallas Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources tell ESPN.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: BREAKING: The Oklahoma City Thunder trading All-Defensive wing Lu Dort to the Atlanta Hawks in a three-team deal that sends three second-round picks to OKC, former No. 1 pick Zaccharie Risacher to the Dallas Mavericks and Ryan Nembhard to Atlanta, sources tell ESPN.
